what_it_does: Defines a 24 by 24 SVG icon depicting a database cylinder using stroked vector shapes.
observations: The SVG uses a 24x24 viewBox with explicit width and height set to 24.
It has no fill and uses currentColor for the stroke.
Stroke width is 1.5 with round line caps and joins.
The drawing consists of one ellipse and two path elements forming stacked database bands.
standouts: The geometry visually represents a database/storage cylinder.
conventions: Follows common icon conventions: 24x24 grid, no fill, stroked paths, rounded stroke styling.
Uses inline SVG attributes rather than classes or external styling.
Contains no title, desc, ids, scripts, or embedded metadata.
notes: This file is a reusable currentColor database icon drawn as a simple stroked SVG.
questions: Should this icon include an accessible title or be treated as decorative by consumers?
purpose_vs_actual: The filename indicates a database icon, and the SVG content draws a database cylinder glyph.
intention_signals: It appears intended to provide a lightweight database/storage symbol that can inherit text or UI color in a design system.
contribution: Provides a reusable database/storage glyph as a compact vector asset for interfaces that need a data or persistence affordance.
summary_for_embedding: A 24x24 currentColor stroked SVG database icon made from one ellipse and two path shapes.
intention_for_embedding: This asset was for representing database or data storage concepts within an icon set or design system.
